message:
fix(fp-conformance): bump unsupported_agg fixture off median (br-frankenpandas-u7n1)

Fixture FP-P2D-128 dataframe_pivot_table_unsupported_agg_hardened
asserted that pivot_table(aggfunc='median') errors with 'not supported',
but pivot_table now supports median (alongside sum/mean/count/min/max/
first/prod/median/var/std). Switches the aggfunc to 'geo_mean' so the
hardened-mode rejection path remains exercised by a genuinely
unsupported function.

Verified: tests::packet_filter_runs_dataframe_reshape_dummy_packet
goes from 22/23 → 23/23 case-pass and the harness now reports green.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
